# Muhammad Awais — AI Solutions Engineer & Full Stack Developer

> Websites & AI for Authors, Publishers & Businesses. 2.5+ years building production apps — RAG chatbots, AI agents, Next.js platforms, and LLM automation workflows. 15+ client projects shipped.

## Identity

- **Name:** Muhammad Awais
- **Role:** AI Solutions Engineer & Full Stack Developer
- **Location:** Karachi, Pakistan
- **Email:** mawaisfreelance2@gmail.com
- **Portfolio:** https://muhammad-awais-portfolio.vercel.app

- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/muhammad-awais-5b37742ba

## Niche Specialization

Primary focus: building digital platforms for **authors, publishers, and content creators** — from custom book websites and publishing agency platforms to AI-powered reader chatbots trained on book content.

- 9+ author book websites delivered (bishopo.com, sameer-hirsi.vercel.app, authorsidibe.com, munshya-alice-tembo.vercel.app, hopepromise.com, authordeepi.com, jamesholmesjr.com, jacobkenrobinson.com, dwightvincentgreen.com)
- 4 publishing agency platforms (publishdigitally.com, elitebookwriters.com, americanbookfounders.com, bookspirepublishing.com)

## Skills & Technologies

| Category       | Technologies                                                                              |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Languages      | TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Python, PHP, SQL                                           |
| Frontend       | Next.js 14+, React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, HTML5/CSS3                                        |
| Backend        | Node.js, Express.js, FastAPI, REST APIs, GraphQL                                          |
| AI / LLM       | OpenAI SDK, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG Pipelines, Prompt Engineering, Vector DBs (Pinecone/Chroma) |
| Databases      | PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase, Firebase                                                   |
| Cloud / DevOps | Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions, CI/CD                                                     |
| Tools          | Figma, Sanity CMS, Stripe API, VS Code                                                    |

## Hero Projects

### Mary Pee Official — Admin Dashboard
Production-grade RBAC admin panel with real-time analytics, dynamic CMS, and Prisma ORM. 55+ commits, actively maintained.
- Live: https://admin-marypeeofficial.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/mhaawais/admin.marypeeofficial
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Tailwind CSS

### AI Book Website + RAG Chatbot
Author marketing site with embedded RAG chatbot trained on book content — 24/7 domain-specific Q&A for readers. Semantic search with <800ms query latency.
- Live: https://hackathon-book-ashy.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/mhaawais/hackathon_book
- Stack: Next.js, Python, LangChain, OpenAI

### AI Todo Manager + Chatbot
Natural language task management via AI chatbot. Multi-phase TypeScript + Python architecture with GitHub Actions CI/CD.
- Live: https://hackathon-2-khaki-psi.vercel.app
- GitHub: https://github.com/mhaawais/hackathon-2
- Stack: Next.js, TypeScript, Python, OpenAI

### ScriptForge — AI Video Script Generator
LangChain/LangGraph-powered tool for content creators. Generates structured video scripts from prompts with tone and style control.
- Live: https://scriptforge-dun.vercel.app
- Stack: Next.js, Python, LangChain, OpenAI

### KinderCode — Kids Coding & EdTech Platform
Gamified coding platform for children. Multi-role auth, real-time progress tracking, story-based modules. Built for Byte-Forge Solutions (European client).
- Live: https://www.kindercode.io/
- GitHub: https://github.com/mhaawais/childrens-website
- Stack: Next.js, React, Supabase, TypeScript

### DataSweeper — AI Data Processing Tool
Python + Streamlit app for automated data cleaning with AI-assisted detection and Pandas/NumPy pipelines.
- Live: https://datasweeper-python-growthmindset.streamlit.app
- Stack: Python, OpenAI, Streamlit

April 2025 – Present | Karachi, Pakistan

- Maintains 5+ web applications with 99.9% uptime and integrated payment gateways

January 2025 – March 2025 | Europe (Remote)
- Built KinderCode (childrens coding platform) with Next.js, React, and Supabase for international client
- 25% performance improvement via frontend/backend optimization and CMS integration

October 2023 – December 2024 | Remote
